title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 507.110 - Suits by infants, how prosecuted
text:
507.110.  Suits by infants, how prosecuted. — Suits by infants may only be commenced and prosecuted, either: First, by a duly appointed guardian or conservator of such infant; or, second, by a next friend appointed for him in such suit; or, third, if asserted by counterclaim, by a guardian ad litem.
(RSMo 1939 § 859, A.L. 1959 H.B. 537, A.L. 1983 S.B. 44 & 45) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 708; 1919 § 1165; 1909 § 1739
